changeSet.author: zafar
changeSet.sql: UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id JOIN product_categories pc ON p.type_id = pc.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'S' THEN '150 мл' WHEN 'M' THEN '250 мл' WHEN 'L' THEN '350 мл' END WHERE s.name = 'Urban Brew' AND pc.type = 'Кофе'

UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id JOIN product_categories pc ON p.type_id = pc.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'S' THEN '250 мл' WHEN 'M' THEN '350 мл' WHEN 'L' THEN '450 мл' END WHERE s.name = 'Urban Brew' AND pc.type = 'Напитки'

UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'Штука' THEN '1 шт' WHEN 'Двойная' THEN '2 шт' END WHERE s.name = 'La Boulangerie'

UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id JOIN product_categories pc ON p.type_id = pc.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'Порция' THEN '350 г' WHEN 'Двойная' THEN '700 г' END WHERE s.name = 'Fresh Bites' AND pc.type = 'Сандвичи'

UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id JOIN product_categories pc ON p.type_id = pc.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'Порция' THEN '300 г' WHEN 'Двойная' THEN '600 г' END WHERE s.name = 'Fresh Bites' AND pc.type = 'Завтраки'

UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'Порция' THEN '300 г' WHEN 'Маленький' THEN '200 г' WHEN 'Большой' THEN '350 г' WHEN 'S' THEN '200 мл' WHEN 'M' THEN '300 мл' WHEN 'L' THEN '400 мл' END WHERE s.name = 'Spice Route'

UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id JOIN product_categories pc ON p.type_id = pc.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'Маленький' THEN '200 г' WHEN 'Большой' THEN '350 г' WHEN 'Порция' THEN '300 г' END WHERE s.name = 'Green Bowl' AND pc.type = 'Салаты'

UPDATE product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.coffee_id = p.id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.id JOIN product_categories pc ON p.type_id = pc.id SET pv.volume = CASE pv.size WHEN 'S' THEN '250 мл' WHEN 'L' THEN '400 мл' END WHERE s.name = 'Green Bowl' AND pc.type = 'Напитки'
